items.title: Early Years
items.description: Play-based discovery, literacy foundations, numeracy, music, art, and social development.

items.title: Primary School
items.description: Core academics, project work, reading fluency, creative expression, and teamwork.

items.title: Middle School
items.description: Inquiry-led science, humanities, mathematics, languages, technology, and advisory support.

items.title: High School
items.description: College preparation, advanced electives, leadership pathways, internships, and career guidance.
